ratings.note: FY25 revenue grew 16% YoY; 13% revenue CAGR since FY21, driven by execution of domestic defence orders.

ratings.instrument: long-term bank facilities (enhanced to INR1,536.5cr from INR1,336.5cr)
ratings.note: Outlook revised to Positive from Stable; ratings reaffirmed (CRISIL A/Positive long-term, CRISIL A1 short-term, CRISIL A/Positive corporate credit rating). Cites established defence-segment market position, revenue growth of 13-14% expected over the medium term, operating margin improving to 24-25%, gearing below 0.5x and interest coverage above 5x through FY26, annual cash accrual of INR160-200cr against INR17-19cr yearly debt obligations, and the planned INR174cr equity raise (the Jun 2025 warrant issue).
